item.title: MacBook Air M1 2020 16GB
item.shortDescription: The M1 chip with 16GB RAM handles everything I throw at it. Perfect for coding, writing, and running multiple apps simultaneously.
item.description: A daily-driver laptop recommendation for coding, video editing, and heavy multitasking.
item.verdict: The machine I stop thinking about because it just keeps up.
item.whyItStayed: Fast enough for coding, writing, media, and too many browser tabs without becoming the constraint.
item.howIUseIt: Daily work, writing, builds, research, editing, and the general command center for everything digital.
item.replaced: A slower laptop that made context switching feel expensive.
item.summary: The M1 chip with 16GB RAM handles everything I throw at it. Perfect for coding, writing, and running multiple apps simultaneously.
